name: OpenZiti
description: OpenZiti — Open-source zero-trust overlay network embedding application-level security directly into the software fabric.

seo.title: OpenZiti — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: OpenZiti: OpenZiti — Open-source zero-trust overlay network embedding application-level security directly into the software fabric.

when_to_use: Zero-trust overlay network embedded directly in app code
mTLS microservice communication without VPN infrastructure
Dark network deployment hiding services from internet scanning
SD-WAN replacement with zero-trust software-defined networking

pros: Kills the need for public listeners
cons: Requires code changes for SDK integration
Not really a secrets manager per se
review.verdict: Powerful zero-trust networking for serious infra teams; don't expect a drop-in secrets vault.
review.best_for: Teams embedding zero-trust connectivity into their own apps.
review.not_for: Teams that just need a secret store or reverse proxy.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
